summary: Completed Phase 2 testing for getszy.com AI Learning Academy. Backend 100% functional (55/55 tests passed) including all Phase 1 regression tests and Phase 2 new features (courses, enrollment, AI Tutor, admin CRUD, extended AI chat intents). Frontend has 2 critical rendering issues: course cards not displaying on Academy page and Admin Courses page despite backend API returning data correctly. Learn page 3-column layout working perfectly. AI Tutor functional but send button has overlay issue.

ui_bugs.issue: Course grid shows 'No courses found' even though backend API returns 5 courses correctly. The course cards are not rendering.
ui_bugs.evidence: Backend API GET /api/courses returns 5 courses, but frontend shows 0 course cards. Direct navigation to course detail page works, suggesting data exists but grid rendering is broken.

ui_bugs.issue: Admin Courses page shows '0 courses' and no course cards render, even though backend API returns 5 courses correctly.
ui_bugs.evidence: Backend API GET /api/admin/courses returns 5 courses, but frontend shows '0 courses' subtitle and empty list. Toggle button works (Add lesson button appears), suggesting some functionality is working.

ui_bugs.issue: AI Tutor send button blocked by 'Made with Emergent' badge overlay. Button is not clickable due to z-index/overlay issue.
ui_bugs.evidence:
Playwright error: '

Made with Emergent

from subtree intercepts pointer events'. The badge needs higher z-index or the tutor panel needs to be above it.

success_percentage.frontend_phase2_new: 70% (Learn page working, but Academy and Admin Courses pages have rendering issues)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix 2 CRITICAL frontend rendering issues: (1) Academy page course grid not rendering - backend API returns 5 courses but frontend shows 'No courses found'. Check Academy.jsx useEffect and CourseCard rendering. (2) Admin Courses page shows '0 courses' - backend API returns 5 courses but frontend doesn't render them. Check admin/Courses.jsx load() function and course list rendering. Also fix HIGH priority issue: AI Tutor send button blocked by 'Made with Emergent' badge overlay - adjust z-index or positioning.
